units.content: a claim dependency — claim 8 depends on claim 7
the actor is characterized as an automated control subsystem
the automated control subsystem is configured to respond to a feedback signal
the feedback signal originates from the system described in claim 7
receipt of feedback signal triggers modification of the physical measurement apparatus operation
the modification requires no human input — fully autonomous operation is asserted
first modification option: altering a sampling schedule of the physical measurement apparatus
second modification option: altering a sensor-selection or sensor-gain parameter
third modification option: altering a data-gating parameter controlling admission of physical-interaction records into storage
the three modification options are disjunctive — at least one must apply, not all are required
the data-gating option extends control to the input boundary of the storage, not just the sensor layer
claim 8 narrows claim 7 by specifying the actor type and constraining it to autonomous, feedback-driven apparatus modification
